name: kodzero/posmall-plugin
description: PostgreSQL-first eCommerce plugin for October CMS and Laravel with catalog, POS, services, virtual products, checkout, orders and API-ready commerce workflows

suggest.vitalybaev/google-merchant-feed: Required to use the Google Merchant Feed integration
suggest.bummzack/omnipay-postfinance: Required to use the PostFinance payment provider
suggest.elasticsearch/elasticsearch: Required to use the ElasticSearch indexing support (experimental)
suggest.offline/jsonq: Required to use the file based index
suggest.tmarois/filebase: Required to use the file based index
suggest.stripe/stripe-php: Required to use the Stripe Hosted Checkout payment provider
suggest.kodzero/posmalltheme-theme: Recommended POSMall storefront theme for catalog, product, service, cart, checkout and account pages
